title: rutidea glabra
intro: Rutidea glabra, also known as the smooth Rutidea, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. Rutidea glabra has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential use as an antimalarial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
